questionHtml: Deduce that the average power output of the battery is about 240 W.
markschemeHtml:
use of E = qV OR energy = 4.3 × 103 × 16 «= 6.88 × 105 J» ✔

power = 241 «W» ✔

Accept 229 W − 241 W depending on the exact value of t used from ai.

Must see at least three s.f.

meta.title: Deduce that the average power output of the battery is about 240 W.
